creator: conrads@cox.net
text:
Incidentally, I do think I'm onto the solution as well for the broken
Webkit support in this port.  Will submit a separate pr for that later.

For now, the only thing needing fixing is the distinfo for other
architectures besides amd64 (i386 and ppc, specifically).  I'll see
what I can do about that.

Conrad

P.S. Does anyone know who the original maintainer was?  I'd like to ask
him or her about the "USE_DOS2UNIX=" line (currently commented out) in
the port's Makefile.

-- 
Conrad J. Sabatier
conrads@cox.net
